allow: Bash(for file in supekku/cli/adr.py supekku/cli/create.py supekku/cli/show.py supekku/cli/sync.py supekku/scripts/decision_registry.py supekku/scripts/lib/decisions/creation.py supekku/scripts/lib/formatters/decision_formatters_test.py supekku/scripts/lib/workspace_test.py)
